name: Ibase Gaming Inc.
summary: Ibase Gaming Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells gaming systems worldwide. It offers gaming solutions for lottery terminals, kiosks, and casino slots. The company also provides OEM and turnkey ODM solutions for terminals, cabinets, class leading PC hardware, and gaming support peripherals. Ibase Gaming Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
